pendingApplications.address: Land At And Adjoining Orchard Rise 127 And La Fosse House 129 Ship Lane Farnborough Hampshire
pendingApplications.proposal: MINOR MATERIAL AMENDMENTS to development approved with planning permission 24/00748/FULdated 6 February 2026 comprising (a) relocation of Plot 6 & 7 houses; (b) separation of Plot 8, 9, 10 & 11 houses to become detached houses, with the Plot 8, 9 & 11 houses increased from 3 to 4-bedroom size; (c) the Plot 12-14 houses to remain as a terrace, but with the Plot 12 house decreased to 2-bedroom size over two floors; and (d) corresponding adjustments to site layout and parking
